data.title: Federal Reserve's Daly Discusses Cryptocurrency Innovation
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on February 18, Federal Reserve official Daly stated that cryptocurrency is an emerging industry. Daly emphasized the importance of not stifling innovation due to fear.

data.title: Spokesperson for Argentine President Milley: No plans to fire any officials over cryptocurrency scandal
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Adolni, spokesman for Argentine President Milley, said that it was an "insult" to think that Milley was involved in bribery in the process of promoting cryptocurrency, and the government currently does not intend to fire any officials due to the cryptocurrency scandal. (Jinshi)

data.title: Fed's Daly Discusses Interest Rate Decisions Amid Economic Uncertainty
data.description: According to Odaily, Federal Reserve official Mary Daly addressed questions about potential further interest rate cuts this year. Daly emphasized the global uncertainty and the need for monetary policy to remain tight. She highlighted the importance of not overlooking the labor market while acknowledging that inflation is gradually decreasing, albeit with some volatility. Daly stressed the necessity for more information before making any hasty decisions that might be regretted.

data.title: Fed's Daly: Cryptocurrency is an emerging industry and we don't want to suppress innovation due to fear
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Fed President Daly said that cryptocurrency is an emerging industry and does not want to suppress innovation due to fear. (Jinshi)

data.title: DEXX: The current compensation process has reached 30%, and some problems have been encountered in the process
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: DEXX posted on the X platform that the compensation work is progressing steadily. So far, the compensation process has reached 30%. Some problems have also been encountered in the compensation process. For example, some users did not receive compensation in time because they did not generate a new secure wallet or pledge NFT; there were also a large number of repeated customer service work order feedback to check for deficiencies and fill in the gaps, which also slowed down the compensation progress to a certain extent, but we have been working hard to solve these problems and actively communicate and coordinate with users.

data.title: Whales Accumulate Over 1.1 Million LINK in 24 Hours
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on-chain analyst @ali_charts has reported that whales have purchased more than 1.1 million LINK tokens in the past 24 hours.

data.title: Whales Accumulate Over 1.1 Million LINK in 24 Hours
data.description: According to Odaily, on-chain analyst @ali_charts has reported that whales have purchased more than 1.1 million LINK tokens in the past 24 hours.

data.title: FTX creditor representative Sunil: Payments to some FTX creditors have been successfully completed
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Sunil, a representative of FTX creditors, posted on the X platform that the payment of FTX creditors with less than $50,000 has started at 10 a.m. Eastern Time, and some payments have been successfully completed, and the accounts can be accessed for inquiry.

data.title: Altius Labs Completes $11 Million Pre-Seed Round of Financing, Led by Founders Fund and Pantera
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Crypto startup Altius Labs has completed a $11 million Pre-Seed round of financing, led by Founders Fund and Pantera, with participation from Archetype, Reforge, DCG, No Limit Holdings, Amber Group, Berachain, Movement, Ethena Labs, Ritual, dao5, Solana Foundation, Hudson River Trading, etc. Altius Labs was co-founded by Anit Chakraborty, a former software engineer at Hudson River Trading, and Annabelle Huang, a former managing partner of Amber Group, and is committed to developing a modular execution stack that is independent of virtual machines (VMs). (Bloomberg)

data.title: Fold To Debut On Nasdaq As First Bitcoin-Focused Financial Firm
data.description: According to Odaily, Fold is set to officially list on Nasdaq tomorrow, marking its debut as the first financial services company dedicated to Bitcoin. The company currently holds over 1,000 Bitcoins on its balance sheet.
